ui.modals.embed.title: Embed word cloud in document
ui.modals.embed.description: Configure options, then insert a word cloud embed at your cursor.
ui.modals.embed.applyError: Could not apply word cloud changes.
ui.modals.embed.scope.name: Scope
ui.modals.embed.scope.desc: Choose whether this cloud uses the note file or the entire vault.
ui.modals.embed.advanced.noneAvailable: No additional advanced settings are available.
ui.modals.embed.size.name: Size
ui.modals.embed.size.desc: Select the embedded cloud size preset.
ui.modals.embed.file.name: File
ui.modals.embed.file.desc: Select the file used when scope is set to file. Choose Current note to use the note containing this embed.
ui.modals.embed.includeTags.name: Include tags
ui.modals.embed.excludeTags.name: Exclude tags
ui.modals.embed.folderPaths.name: Folder paths
ui.modals.embed.folderPaths.desc: Optional comma-separated folder paths to include when scope is folder.
ui.modals.embed.frontmatterRules.name: Frontmatter rules
ui.modals.embed.frontmatterRules.desc: Use key|operator|value; separate rules with semicolons.
ui.modals.embed.minCount.name: Minimum count
ui.modals.embed.maxCount.name: Maximum count
ui.modals.embed.excludeWords.name: Exclude words
ui.modals.embed.excludeWords.desc: Optional comma-separated words excluded only in this cloud.
ui.modals.embed.matchMode.name: Include match mode
ui.modals.embed.matchMode.desc: How include tags should match when multiple tags are set.
ui.blocks.embed.resolveFileError: Could not resolve the file for this embedded cloud.
ui.blocks.embed.folderScopeNeedsPath: Add at least one folder path for folder scope.
ui.blocks.embed.noWords: No words found for this embedded cloud.
ui.blocks.embed.renderError: Could not render embedded word cloud.
ui.blocks.embed.editDescription: Update options for this embedded cloud without editing markdown manually.
ui.blocks.embed.sourceNoteNotFound: Could not locate the source note for this embedded word cloud.
ui.blocks.embed.blockNotFoundToUpdate: Could not locate the embedded word cloud block to update.
settings.tab.filters.heading: Filters
settings.tab.filters.minimumWordLength.d: Ignore words shorter than this length.
settings.tab.filters.nlp.enabled.name: Enable NLP processing
settings.tab.filters.nlp.enabled.desc: Apply lightweight normalization before filtering and counting words.
settings.tab.filters.nlp.mode.name: NLP mode
settings.tab.filters.nlp.mode.desc: Choose how aggressively to normalize words.
settings.tab.filters.nlp.preserveAcronym: Avoid transforming uppercase acronym tokens such as API.
Only apply suffix normalization when the resulting token stays at or above this length.
settings.tab.filters.nlp.filterNumericTo: Remove purely numeric tokens during NLP processing.
settings.tab.filters.addExcludedWord.des: Excluded words are applied vault wide.
settings.tab.render.heading: Layout
settings.tab.render.description: These settings control what the default rendered view for any word cloud is across all pages. These defaults can be overridden for each word cloud.
settings.tab.interactions.heading: Interactions
settings.tab.render.rotation.name: Rotation style
settings.tab.render.rotation.desc: How words are angled in the cloud.
settings.tab.render.spiral.name: Spiral layout
settings.tab.render.wordPadding.name: Word padding
settings.tab.render.fontSizeRange.name: Font size range
settings.tab.render.fontSizeRange.desc: Set minimum and maximum font size. Minimum cannot exceed maximum.
settings.tab.render.fontFamily.name: Font family
settings.tab.render.fontFamily.desc: Choose a supported font family for words.
settings.tab.render.showCount.name: Show count for words
settings.tab.render.showCount.desc: Append count directly to rendered words.
settings.tab.render.wordCaseMode.name: Word case mode
settings.tab.render.wordCaseMode.desc: Choose whether labels use lowercase words or normalized display casing.
Keep cloud layout stable across refreshes using a seed.
settings.tab.render.mouseInteractions.de: Allow pan, zoom, and context menu interactions with the cloud.
settings.tab.render.clickToSearch.name: Click to search
settings.tab.render.clickToSearch.desc: Allow clicking a word to open search results for that word.
settings.tab.render.controls.name: Enable controls
settings.tab.render.controls.desc: Show on-canvas controls such as refresh and zoom buttons.
settings.tab.render.exporting.name: Enable exporting
settings.tab.render.exporting.desc: Show export buttons for PNG and SVG downloads.
settings.tab.render.scalingMode.name: Size scaling mode
settings.tab.render.scalingMode.desc: How numeric count differences map to font-size differences.
settings.tab.render.scalingEmphasis.name: Size scaling emphasis
settings.tab.render.scalingEmphasis.desc: Higher values exaggerate size differences (power scaling mode).
settings.tab.performance.heading: Performance
settings.tab.performance.processingSpeed: Controls how fast scanning your vault and generating word clouds runs.
settings.tab.performance.benchmark.name: Benchmark all performance modes
settings.tab.performance.benchmark.desc: Run full-vault renders using each performance mode and compare results.
settings.tab.reset.heading: Reset settings
settings.tab.reset.all.name: Reset settings to default
settings.tab.reset.all.desc: Restore all settings sections to their default values.
settings.tab.reset.all.confirm: Reset all settings sections to defaults? This cannot be undone.
settings.tab.support.title: Support and feedback
settings.tab.support.description: Open a GitHub issue to report a bug or suggest a feature.
